actionable_lessons: Use execution-aware simulation instead of midpoint-only replay when judging strategy viability.
Model queue and fill uncertainty directly.
anti_patterns: This does not mean a full LOB simulator is required before every decision.
Do not overfit on simulated microstructure without validating against real fills.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Use execution-aware simulation instead of midpoint-only replay when judging strategy viability.
- Model queue and fill uncertainty directly.

What it does not justify:
- This does not mean a full LOB simulator is required before every decision.
- Do not overfit on simulated microstructure without validating against real fills.
citation: Simulating and Analyzing Order Book Data: The Queue-Reactive Model (https://arxiv.org/abs/1312.0563)
summary: Order-book simulation framework focused on queue dynamics and local market-state evolution.
title: Simulating and Analyzing Order Book Data: The Queue-Reactive Model
